columns.extraction_plan: The text states "790 patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were equally randomly assigned to receive either ADT in combination with docetaxel 75 mg/m² for up to six cycles or ADT alone." This implies two arms. The CONSORT diagram on page 2 (Figure 1) shows: * ADT plus docetaxel: N = 397 * ADT alone: N = 393
